title: Treasure Sweep Web
hook: Sweep a detector across sandy dig sites, follow the signal pulse, brush out relics, then upgrade your kit and unlock richer locations.
hook_ru: Води детектором по песчаным локациям, ищи сигнал, очищай реликвии кисточкой, улучшай набор и открывай новые места.
mechanic: Timed treasure hunt: hidden items spawn under a location background; the detector signal rises with proximity, locks and reveals the item, then the player holds near it to brush it out. Runs spend energy; batteries can drop mid-run; collected treasures pay coins and fill a persistent collection.
progression: Coins, three upgrade lines, offline-regenerating energy, unique collection count, and three location tiers.
assets: Extracted from Tim's APK build with UnityPy and resized for the standalone canvas runtime.

gates.webapp_gate: PASS - synced gallery copy boots at /games/treasure_sweep_web/
